chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.189 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 10.02.2025 Mr. Aftab Ahmed, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Counsel for applicant/accused does not press the instant criminal bail application, the same is according dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
